base.name: Bleed
base.desc: Inflicts 2 stacks of bleed. Bleeding enemies receive 1 damage per stack when hit by a ball (max 8 stacks).

base.name: Brood Mother
base.desc: Has a 25% chance of birthing a baby ball each time it hits an enemy.

base.name: Burn
base.desc: Add 1 stack of burn on hit for 3 seconds (max 3 stacks). Burnt units are dealt 4-8 damage per stack per second.

base.name: Cell
base.desc: Splits into a clone on hit 2 times.

base.name: Charm
base.desc: Each hit has a 4% chance of charming the enemy for 5 seconds. Charmed units walk up the board and attack enemies.

base.name: Dark
base.desc: Deals 3.0x damage but destroys itself after hitting an enemy. Has a 3 second cooldown before it can be shot again.

base.name: Earthquake
base.desc: Deals 5-13 damage to nearby units in a 3x3 tile square.

base.name: Egg Sac
base.desc: Explodes into 2-4 baby balls on hitting an enemy. Has a 3 second cooldown before it can be shot again.

base.name: Freeze
base.desc: Has a 4% chance to freeze enemies for 5.0 seconds. Frozen enemies receive 25% more damage.

base.name: Ghost
base.desc: Passes through enemies.

base.name: Iron
base.desc: Deals double damage but moves 40% slower.

base.name: Laser (Horizontal)
base.desc: Deals 9-18 damage to all enemies in the same row.

base.name: Laser (Vertical)
base.desc: Deals 9-18 damage to all enemies in the same column.

base.name: Light
base.desc: Blinds enemies on hit for 3 seconds. Blinded units have a hard time detecting you and have a 50% chance of missing when they attack.

base.name: Lightning
base.desc: Deals 1-20 damage to up to 3 nearby enemies.

base.name: Stone
base.desc: Initially deals 300% damage. Damage erodes by 40% each time hitting an enemy (minimum 50%).

base.name: Poison
base.desc: Applies 1 stack of poison on hit (max 5 stacks). Poison lasts for 6 seconds and each stack deals 1-4 damage per second.

base.name: Time
base.desc: Explodes into a time snare upon hitting an enemy, which stays on the field for 20 seconds and freezes enemies inside it.

base.name: Vampire
base.desc: Each hit has a 4.5% chance of healing 1 health.

base.name: Wind
base.desc: Passes through enemies and slows them down by 30% for 5 seconds, but deals 25% less damage.

evolved.name: Assassin
evolved.desc: Passes through the front of enemies, but not the back. Backstabs deal 30% bonus damage.

evolved.name: Banished Flame
evolved.desc: Add 1 stack of darkflame on hit for 2 seconds (max 6 stacks). Darkflame deals 1-30 damage per stack per second. When the darkflame goes out, it deals 1-100 to the enemy.

evolved.name: Banshee
evolved.desc: Curses all enemies while on the field when launched. Cursed enemies are dealt 150-300 after being hit 6 times.

evolved.name: Berserk
evolved.desc: Each hit has a 30% chance of causing enemies to go berserk for 6 seconds. Berserk enemies deal 15-24 damage to adjacent enemies every second

evolved.name: Black Hole
evolved.desc: Instantly kills the first non-boss enemy that it hits, but destroys itself afterwards. Has a 7 second cooldown before it can be shot again

evolved.name: Blizzard
evolved.desc: Freezes all enemies within a 2 tile radius for 0.8 seconds, dealing 1-50 damage

evolved.name: Bomb
evolved.desc: Explodes when hitting an enemy, dealing 150-300 damage to nearby enemies. Has a 3 second cooldown before it can be shot again

evolved.name: Brimstone
evolved.desc: Applies 1 stack of burn and poison every second to all enemies within a 2 tile radius (max 4 stacks). Burn deals 1-4 damage per stack per second and poison deals 2-3 damage per stack per second.

evolved.name: Catapult
evolved.desc: Launches 3-5 stone baby balls every 1.5 seconds, which are destroyed after hitting anything.

evolved.name: Erosion
evolved.desc: Passes through enemies. Deals 3% of enemy's current health as bonus damage on hit.

evolved.name: Fireworks
evolved.desc: Explodes into 3-6 fireworks. Fireworks target random enemies, dealing 20-30 damage and applying 1 stack of burn. Burnt units are dealt 7-11 damage per stack per second.

evolved.name: Flash
evolved.desc: Damage all enemies on screen for 1-3 damage after hitting an enemy and blind them for 2 seconds

evolved.name: Flicker
evolved.desc: Deals 1-7 damage to every enemy on screen every 1.4 seconds

evolved.name: Freeze Ray
evolved.desc: Emits a freeze ray when hitting an enemy, dealing 20-50 to all enemies in its path, with a 10% chance of freezing them for 10.0 seconds

evolved.name: Frozen Flame
evolved.desc: Add 1 stack of frostburn on hit for 20 seconds (max 4 stacks). Frostburnt units are dealt 8-12 damage per stack per second and receive 25% more damage from other sources

evolved.name: Glacier
evolved.desc: Releases glacial spikes over time that deal 15-30 to enemies that touch them and freeze them for 2.0 seconds. This ball and its glacial spikes also deal 6-12 damage to nearby units

evolved.name: Heart Swallower
evolved.desc: Saps enemies on hit, with a 40% chance of stealing 1 health and reducing their attack damage by 20%. Lifesteal chance only applies once per enemy.

evolved.name: Hemorrhage
evolved.desc: Inflicts 3 stacks of bleed. When hitting an enemy with 12 stacks of bleed or more, consumes all stacks of bleed to deal 20% of their current health

evolved.name: Holy Laser
evolved.desc: Deals 24-36 damage to all enemies in the same row and column

evolved.name: Incubus
evolved.desc: Each hit has a 4% chance of charming the enemy for 9 seconds. Charmed enemies curse nearby enemies. Cursed enemies are dealt 100-200 after being hit 5 times

evolved.name: Inferno
evolved.desc: Applies 1 stack of burn every second to all enemies within a 2 tile radius. Burn lasts for 6 seconds, dealing 3-7 damage per stack per seconds

evolved.name: Landslide
evolved.desc: Creates a landslide and destroys self upon hitting an enemy. The landslide lasts for 5 seconds and deals 20-30 damage per second to enemies within a 2 tile radius

evolved.name: Laser Beam
evolved.desc: Emit a laser beam on hit that deals 30-42 damage and blinds enemies for 8 seconds

evolved.name: Laser Cutter
evolved.desc: Constantly emits a laser in front of it, which deals 100-150 damage per second.

evolved.name: Leech
evolved.desc: Attaches up to 1 leech onto enemies it hits, which add 2 stacks of bleed per seconds (max 24 stacks)

evolved.name: Lightning Rod
evolved.desc: Plants a lightning rod into enemies it hits. These enemies are struck by lightning every 3.0 seconds, dealing 1-30 damage to up to 8 nearby enemies

evolved.name: Lovestruck
evolved.desc: Inflicts lovestruck on hit enemies for 20 seconds. Lovestruck units have a 50% chance of healing you for 5 health when they attack

evolved.name: Maggot
evolved.desc: Infest enemies on hit with maggots. When they dies, they explode into 1-2 baby balls

evolved.name: Magma
evolved.desc: Emits lava blobs over time. Enemies who walk into lava blobs are dealt 15-30 damage and gain 1 stack of burn (max 3 stacks). Burn lasts for 3 seconds, dealing 3-8 damage per stack per second. This ball and its lava blobs also deal 6-12 damage to nearby units

evolved.name: Mosquito King
evolved.desc: Spawns a mosquito each time it hits an enemy. Mosquitos attack a random enemy, dealing 80-120 damage each. If a mosquito kills an enemy, they steal 1 health

evolved.name: Mosquito Swarm
evolved.desc: Explodes into 3-6 mosquitos. Mosquitos attack random enemies, dealing 80-120 damage each. If a mosquito kills an enemy, they steal 1 health

evolved.name: Nosferatu
evolved.desc: Spawns a vampire bat each bounce. Vampire bats fly towards a random enemy, dealing 132-176 damage on hit, turning into a Vampire Lord

evolved.name: Noxious
evolved.desc: Passes through enemies and applies 3 stacks of poison to nearby enemies within a 2 tile radius. Poison lasts for 4 seconds and each stack deals 1-3 damage per second

evolved.name: Nuclear Bomb
evolved.desc: Explodes when hitting an enemy, dealing 300-500 damage to nearby enemies and applying 1 stack of radiation to everyone present indefinitely (max 5 stacks). Each stack of radiation increases damage received by 10%. Has a 3 second cooldown

evolved.name: Overgrowth
evolved.desc: Applies 1 stack of overgrowth. Upon reaching 3, consume all stacks and deal 150-200 damage to all enemies in a 3x3 tile square

evolved.name: Phantom
evolved.desc: Curse enemies on hit. Cursed enemies are dealt 100-200 damage after being hit 5 times

evolved.name: Radiation Beam
evolved.desc: Emit a radiation beam on hit that deals 24-48 damage and applies 1 stack of radiation (max 5 stacks). Radiation lasts for 15 seconds and cause enemies to receive 10% more damage from all sources per stack

evolved.name: Reaper
evolved.desc: Has a 10% chance to kill enemies on impact, healing you for 5 health.

evolved.name: Sacrifice
evolved.desc: Inflicts 4 stacks of bleed (max 15 stacks) and applies curse to hit enemies. Cursed enemies are dealt 50-100 after being hit 5 times

evolved.name: Sandstorm
evolved.desc: Goes through enemies and is surrounded by a raging storm dealing 10-20 damage per second and blinding nearby enemies for 3 seconds

evolved.name: Satan
evolved.desc: While active, add 1 stack of burn to all active enemies per second (max 5 stacks), dealing 10-20 damage per stack per second and make them go berserk, dealing 15-24 damage to adjacent enemies every second

evolved.name: Shotgun
evolved.desc: Shoots 3-7 iron baby balls after hitting a wall. Iron baby balls move at 200% speed but are destroyed upon hitting anything

evolved.name: Sniper
evolved.desc: Pierces enemies and shoots 3-7 sniper baby balls after hitting a wall. Sniper baby balls pierce enemies but are destroyed upon hitting a wall.

evolved.name: Soul Sucker
evolved.desc: Passes through enemies and saps them, with a 30% chance of stealing 1 health and reducing their attack damage by 20%. Lifesteal chance only applies once per enemy

evolved.name: Spider Queen
evolved.desc: Has a 25% chance of birthing an Egg Sac each time it hits an enemy

evolved.name: Steel
evolved.desc: Initially deals double damage but moves 50% slower. Damage increases by 10% each time it hits an enemy (max 300%).

evolved.name: Storm
evolved.desc: Emits lightning to strike nearby enemies every second, dealing 1-40 damage

evolved.name: Succubus
evolved.desc: Each hit has a 4% chance of charming the enemy for 9 seconds. Heals 1 when hitting a charmed enemy

evolved.name: Sun
evolved.desc: Blind all enemies in view and add 1 stack of burn every second (max 5 stacks). Burn lasts for 6 seconds and deals 6-12 damage per stack per second

evolved.name: Swamp
evolved.desc: Leaves behind tar blobs over time. Enemies who walk into tar blobs are dealt 15-30, are slowed by 50% for 7 seconds and gain 1 stack of poison (max 8 stacks). Each stack of poison deals 1-3 damage per second. This ball and its tar blobs also deal 6-12 damage to nearby units

evolved.name: Time Bomb
evolved.desc: Throws a time bomb every few seconds, which explodes after a delay, dealing 80-120 damage to nearby enemies.

evolved.name: Timestop
evolved.desc: Freezes everything on the field for 5.0 seconds but destroys itself after hitting an enemy. Has a 30 second cooldown before it can be shot again.

evolved.name: Vampire Lord
evolved.desc: Each hit inflicts 3 stacks of bleed. Heals 1 health and consumes all stacks when hitting an enemy with at least 10 stacks of bleed

evolved.name: Venom
evolved.desc: Applies 1 stack of venom on hit (max 8 stacks). Each stack deal 3-6 damage per second and slows down enemies.

evolved.name: Virus
evolved.desc: Applies 1 stack of disease to units it hits (max 8 stacks). Disease lasts for 6 seconds. Each stack of disease deals 3-6 damage per second and diseased units have a 15% chance of passing a stack to undiseased nearby enemies each second

evolved.name: Voluptuous Egg Sac
evolved.desc: Explodes into 2-3 egg sacs on hitting an enemy. Has a 3 second cooldown before it can be shot again

evolved.name: Warp
evolved.desc: After each hit, warps to a random spot on the field and speeds up by 5%.

evolved.name: Wraith
evolved.desc: Freezes any enemy it passes through for 0.8 seconds

evolved.name: X Ray
evolved.desc: Emits an X-shaped laser on hit, which deals 50-75 damage to enemies and applies 1 stack of radiation (max 5 stacks). Radiation causes enemies to receive 10% more damage from all sources per stack.
